hypothesis: Based on exp_0014 (best=0.97640) which added item_id x store_id smoothed target encoding, try adding item_id x dept_id x wday smoothed target encoding to capture day-of-week sales patterns at the department level. Also add store_id x wday encoding to capture store-level day-of-week patterns. Using smoothing factor 50 and training data only to avoid leakage. All other settings from exp_0012 (best=0.94640).
